title: Udgir Fort
tagline: Udgir Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Udgir Fort in the Udgir city in Latur district, Maharashtra of India is a fort built in pre-Bahamani age, dating from the twelfth century CE.
overview.description: Udgir Fort in the Udgir city in Latur district, Maharashtra of India is a fort built in pre-Bahamani age, dating from the twelfth century CE. It is famous for the historic Battle of Udgir of 1760, in which the Marathas, led by Sadashivrao Bhau, defeated the Nizam, and after which the Treaty of Udgir was signed. The fort is named after the Hindu Saint Udaygiri Rishi. Scattered throughout the surrounding hills, there are a number of old military observation points and rest houses, built from an unusual white clay. However, all have long since fallen into disrepair.

topPlaces.name: Udgir
topPlaces.description: Udgir is a city and Municipal Council in District in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is also the headquarters for Udgir Taluka, one of the ten talukas in Udgir, and one of the largest cities in Aurangabad division of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

items.note: Udgir is a city and Municipal Council in District in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is also the headquarters for Udgir Taluka, one of the ten talukas in Udgir, and one of the largest cities in Aurangabad division of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Udgir Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Udgir Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Udgir Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (152 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Udgir Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Udgir Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Udgir Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Udgir Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
